data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'conditional questions based on responses'. However, the evidence provided only describes a linear flow of questions without any indication of conditional logic being applied based on previous responses. Specifically, while there are follow-up questions based on ratings, there is no evidence of branching logic that would indicate conditional questions, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence for conditional questions based on responses.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
